signals.headline: Interview with PERC Chairman Chris Hill
signals.summary:
Chris Hill, the president and CEO of Meritum Energy, discusses his role as chairman of the Propane Education & Research Council (PERC).

The post Interview with PERC Chairman Chris Hill first appeared on LP Gas .
